title: Freaky Ali
desc: After a chance encounter with a golfer inspires him, Ali, a debt collector working for a gangster, pursues the sport professionally. Soon, he becomes a champion, but he must face a corrupt rival.

title: Gulzar Dil (oru Naal Oru Kanavu Tamil) (dub)
desc: It's is a romantic drama about Cheenu, a young man who initially pretends to fall in love with Maya as part of a challenge. However, he eventually falls for her for real, and they must overcome family obstacles to be together.

title: Yamla Pagla Deewana
desc: Dharam (Dharmendra) and Gajodhar (Bobby Deol) are a father-son con team skilled in tricking their unsuspecting fellow Indians. When a nonresident Indian, Paramvir (Sunny Deol), arrives from Vancouver claiming to be Dharam's long-lost son, the duo doesn't buy it, but they admire his strength and take him into their fold. Eventually Gajodhar falls for a young woman, Saheba (Kulraj Randhawa). But when Saheba's brothers disapprove of the match, Paramvir designs a plan for Gajodhar to win her back.

title: Krishna Cottage
desc: The movie revolves around a group of college students who visit a haunted house called "Krishna Cottage." As they unravel the mystery behind the house, they uncover dark secrets and a vengeful spirit that haunts them

title: Ilaka (peddupettai)
desc: Crime drama about Kumar, a man who rises from a slum to become a powerful figure in the underworld after witnessing his mother's murder. Driven by ambition and vengeance, he navigates betrayal and crime.
